claim_text: Seasonal crop evapotranspiration (ETc) of wheat ranged from 390.8 to 427.3 mm over the whole growth period.

value.raw_value_text: The ETc for the whole growth period of wheat varied from a minimum value of 390.8mm to a maximum of 427.3mm. The overall average was 413.7mm.
